GM:(0,0,0)  A:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  M:(1/2,1/2,0)  R:(0,1/2,1/2)  RA:(-1/2,0,1/2)  X:(0,1/2,0)  XA:(-1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM:(0,0,0)  R:(1/2,1/2,1/2)  S:(1/2,1/2,0)  T:(0,1/2,1/2)  U:(1/2,0,1/2)  Y:(0,1/2,0)  X:(1/2,0,0)  Z:(0,0,1/2)
GM1+  GM2+  GM1-  GM2-  GM3+GM4+  GM3-GM4-  GM5  GM6  (A)R1  (A)R2R2  (A)R3R4  (M)S1+  (M)S2+  (M)S1-  (M)S2-  (M)S3+S4+  (M)S3-S4-  (M)S5  (M)S6  (R)T1+  (R)T1-  (R)T2  (R)T3  (R)T4  (R)T5  (R)T6  (R)T7  (R)T8  (R)T9  (RA)U1+  (RA)U1-  (RA)U2  (RA)U3  (RA)U4  (RA)U5  (RA)U6  (RA)U7  (RA)U8  (RA)U9  (X)Y2  (X)Y1  (X)Y3  (X)Y4  (XA)X1  (XA)X2  (XA)X3  (XA)X4  Z1  Z2Z2  Z3Z4
